Assembly: The assembly idNemPant2.1 is based on 30x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. X and Y identified based on PacBio read coverage. Y chromosome is unscaffolded as HiC is from a female sample.

Assembly: The assembly idNemNigr1.1 is based on 40x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using rapid curation. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Areas of unknown order and orientation are: Chromosome 1 - 82,000-152,000 Kbp, Chromosome 2 - 100,000-135,000 Kbp, Chromosome 3 - 72,400-97,000 Kbp, Chromosome 4 - 65,000-68,500 Kbp.
